name: TAO 4h Failed Breakdown Hold Continuation v1
edge_mechanism: a breakdown attempt fails, support is reclaimed and held, and continuation is entered only once that hold confirms directional reassertion
thesis: Cycle 90 still allows exactly one continuation-family expression, and TAO 4h remains the only lane where continuation is structurally justified. The failed-breakdown hold entry is retained because it is cleaner than breakout theater and remains the best structural repair the evidence supports. This is the one continuation shot the batch gets.
invalidation_condition: If TAO 4h still produces weak expectancy or inadequate density after this cleaner trigger, continuation work should be deprioritized again.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price breaks below local support, rejects the move, reclaims support, holds it, and then resumes in the dominant direction.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: In a trend-capable lane, failed breakdowns can trap late shorts and create better continuation location than late chase entries. This remains the cleanest structurally justified continuation idea in the basket.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: TAO 4h is the best fit because it is still the only lane in the basket where continuation has strong enough regime support to be worth a slot.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: The hold may still come too late after the move, converting the setup into local exhaustion buying.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries work but drawdown is still too large, bring the first partial closer before changing the hold requirement.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: Lower count than the intraday reclaim/state-change ideas, but better asymmetry when the resumed leg is real.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: TAO 4h clears moderate density and materially improves expectancy over recent continuation-family aborts.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, sub-12 trades, or another clearly negative expectancy profile despite adequate count.

density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: acceptable only because lane fit is strongly trend-capable

validation_basket.why_included: Best-fit trend-capable lane for failed-breakdown hold continuation.
validation_basket.continue_if: TAO 4h produces enough reclaim-hold resumptions with positive first-target expectancy.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: TAO 4h still shows weak expectancy or inadequate density after the cleaner trigger.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Moderate count with a few strong continuation runners.

validation_basket.why_included: Checks whether the same failed-breakdown hold logic survives on the denser primary-context lane even if continuation is smaller.
validation_basket.continue_if: BTC 1h preserves reclaim-hold behavior with acceptable expectancy.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: BTC 1h turns it into weak churn noise.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: More frequent but smaller reclaim continuations than TAO.

validation_basket.why_included: Useful control to test whether the thesis is too dependent on TAO trend structure.
validation_basket.continue_if: ETH 1h still prints orderly reclaim-hold continuation despite mixed chop.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: ETH 1h confirms the concept needs stronger trend contamination.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Sparse and smaller reclaim continuations than TAO.

long: Next bar low remains >= DONCHIAN_LOW_20 - 0.08 * ATR_14
short: Next bar high remains <= DONCHIAN_HIGH_20 + 0.08 * ATR_14
